$comment: Schema version 4.0 - Adds `ending` primitive node type (BL5). Node primitives: action, conditional, user_prompt, ending. Composites: confirm, gated_action, goal_seek.
title: Blueprint Node Types Schema
description: Definitions for workflow node types: action, conditional, user_prompt, ending

description.description: Human-readable description of what this node does

on_success.description: Node or ending to transition to on success

on_failure.description: Node or ending to transition to on failure. When omitted, routes to workflow default_error.

condition.description: Condition to evaluate. String = evaluate_expression shorthand. Object with all/any/none/xor key (no type key) = composite shorthand. Object with type key = canonical precondition.

on_true.description: Node to transition to if condition is true

on_false.description: Node to transition to if condition is false

on_unknown.description: Node to transition to if condition result is unknown (3VL)

audit.description: Enable audit mode for comprehensive condition evaluation without short-circuiting

enabled.description: Enable audit mode (evaluate all conditions, collect results)

output.description: State path where audit results are written

messages.description: Error messages keyed by precondition type name

on_response.description: Map of option IDs to response handlers. String value = next_node shorthand (no consequences).

ending_node.description: Terminal node. Reaching an ending emits the declared outcome and stops the FSM. Behavior (silent/delegate/restart) governs post-termination handling.

category.description: Optional categorization for error outcomes (e.g., safety, validation, configuration, permission, external).

message.description: Message to display at termination (supports ${} interpolation).

summary.description: Structured summary data to display at termination.

recovery.description: Recovery guidance for error outcomes. Simple string or structured object.

consequences.description: Consequences run at termination (best-effort; failures are logged but do not prevent completion).

behavior.description: Post-termination behavior. Defaults to display (show message/summary).

oneOf.description: Restart the workflow from a target node.

confirm_node.description: Confirmation composite — yes/no prompt with structural state gating. Expands to user_prompt → mutate_state → conditional → (optional action). See principle: confirmations-as-explicit-state.

header.description: Short header/tag (max 12 chars). Defaults to CONFIRM if omitted.

store_as.description: Dot-notation state field to hold the boolean decision (convention: confirmations.<name>). REQUIRED — the confirm composite always writes this field true|false before routing.

label.description: Label for the yes option. Defaults to 'Yes'.

consequences.description: Optional consequences to run AFTER the conditional gate, before routing to next_node.

next_node.description: Node to transition to when the user confirms.

label.description: Label for the no option. Defaults to 'No'.

next_node.description: Node to transition to when the user declines.

gated_action_node.description: Multi-way CASE/WHEN dispatch composite. First-match-wins over an ordered list of conditions, each with optional consequences and a routing target. Expands to a chain of conditional nodes, each optionally followed by an action.

condition.description: Condition to evaluate. Same polymorphism as conditional nodes: string = evaluate_expression shorthand; object with all/any/none/xor key = composite shorthand; object with type key = canonical precondition.

consequences.description: Optional consequences to run when this branch is taken, before routing to next_node.

next_node.description: Node to transition to when this condition matches.

else.description: Fallthrough destination when no when-clause matches. Required — no silent fall-through.

on_unknown.description: Destination when any condition returns unknown (3VL short-circuit). Optional — defaults to workflow default_error.

goal_seek_node.description: Goal-seeking composite. Walker expands to a bounded dispatcher loop that iterates sub-processes until every goal's status is 'satisfied' or 'ignored', the abort flag is set, or the iteration budget is exhausted. See blueprint-composites.md and principle: goal-seeking-as-bounded-loop.

starting_node.description: Entry node for this goal's sub-process. Sub-process terminals must route back to the goal_seek node id.

success_condition.description: Optional precondition re-checked on every loop iteration. If omitted, the walker flips status to 'satisfied' as soon as the sub-process returns. If present, the return edge is a pass-through and the loop continues until the condition holds.

run_as.description: Execution mode for this goal's sub-process. 'subagent' delegates to a separate agent context at runtime (declared here, honored by hiivmind-blueprint-mcp). Default 'inline'.

max_iterations.description: Hard cap on loop iterations. When exceeded, routes to on_budget_exceeded (or workflow default_error).

on_complete.description: Destination when every goal's status is 'satisfied' or 'ignored'.

on_abort.description: Destination when any sub-process sets goal_seek.<node_id>.aborted = true. Optional — defaults to workflow default_error.

on_budget_exceeded.description: Destination when iterations exceed max_iterations. Optional — defaults to workflow default_error.

oneOf.$comment: Static options: options is array, no options_from_state
Dynamic options: options is mapping template object, options_from_state required

options.description: Polymorphic: array for static choices (2-4 options), object for mapping template (with options_from_state)

options_from_state.description: State path to array of items for dynamic options. When present, options must be a mapping template object.

consequences.description: Consequences to apply when this option is selected

next_node.description: Node to transition to. Supports ${} interpolation for dynamic routing.

precondition.description: A workflow precondition (boolean check). The schema validates structure only - precondition type validation is delegated to runtime.
precondition.$comment: Schema version 2.0 - Precondition-agnostic design. Type validation at runtime.

type.description: Precondition type identifier (e.g., file_exists, flag_set, all_of)

error_message.description: Error message to display if precondition fails (used in validation gates)

consequence.description: A workflow consequence (action to execute). The schema validates structure only - consequence type validation is delegated to runtime.
consequence.$comment: Schema version 2.0 - Consequence-agnostic design. Type validation at runtime.

type.description: Consequence type identifier (e.g., set_state, clone_repo, run_python)
